title: Skyblock Re-Creator
description: A fabric mod that lets you add skyblock-like world type(s)
body:
# About
Skyblock Re-Creator is a fork of [Skyblock Creator](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-creator), which is a fork of [Structure World](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-world). It lets you add new skyblock-like world types, with configurable islands and fill blocks. On a server, each player can create their own island Currently this is just a port to 1.20.1, but I might add new features in the future. See Skyblock Creator's site if you want to know how to use this mod.

# Features
- Add multiple skyblock-like world types
- Configurable island using structure (```.nbt``` file)
- Void Nether and void The End
- Multiplayer/server support
- Customizable command name

# Features that I might add in the future
- Support for layers (just like in a flat world)
- Support for using vanilla biome distribution instead of just one biome
